item.title: Jet Ski Dispute & Social Media Suicide
item.ns0:title: Jet Ski Dispute & Social Media Suicide
item.description:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, jet ski operators at Goodman’s Bay demand government action on long-promised infrastructure improvements while navigating the fallout of new international safety alerts. Our team also explores the complex link between social media and youth mental health with expert advice for parents on managing digital disconnect this summer. We follow a Bahamian trailblazer’s historic run for the Florida Senate and celebrate the latest graduates of a major community empowerment initiative. Plus, we share heartfelt tributes to the nation's fathers and provide your complete forecast as Saharan dust and rising temperatures take hold.

----- Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, jet ski operators at Goodman’s Bay demand government action on long-promised infrastructure improvements while navigating the fallout of new international safety alerts. Our team also explores the complex link between social media and youth mental health with expert advice for parents on managing digital disconnect this summer. We follow a Bahamian trailblazer’s historic run for the Florida Senate and celebrate the latest graduates of a major community empowerment initiative. Plus, we share heartfelt tributes to the nation's fathers and provide your complete forecast as Saharan dust and rising temperatures take hold.

-----

item.ns0:summary: Tonight on Our News Weekend, jet ski operators at Goodman’s Bay demand government action on long-promised infrastructure improvements while navigating the fallout of new international safety alerts. Our team also explores the complex link between social media and youth mental health with expert advice for parents on managing digital disconnect this summer. We follow a Bahamian trailblazer’s historic run for the Florida Senate and celebrate the latest graduates of a major community empowerment initiative. Plus, we share heartfelt tributes to the nation's fathers and provide your complete forecast as Saharan dust and rising temperatures take hold. -----Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
